channel.title: funny on Blog of Jason Meridth
channel.description: Recent content in funny on Blog of Jason Meridth

item.title: xkcd2 - someone is wrong
item.description: Who was I thinking of when I read this? Oh, there are so many people.

item.title: xkcd - ubuntu, python comics
item.description: If you don’t currently read xkcd.com, you should be. It has some mushy lovey dovey junk in it sometimes, but the python references and open source references are hilarious.
